description: A threat actor attributed to Russian military intelligence (GRU), active since at least 2004. Known for aggressive credential theft operations, spearphishing campaigns, and targeting of government, military, and media organisations.
scenario: A spearphishing campaign has been identified targeting users within the organisation. Endpoint telemetry indicates follow-on execution activity following email interaction. Investigate the full attack chain from initial access through to the adversary's objectives.
environment_note: This group predominantly targets endpoint environments. Focus on process execution chains, credential access activity, and lateral movement techniques.
